Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Alan Alda stars! This episode features Alda as a department store Santa, and as Eunice's brother Larry.
Video.title: Alan Alda

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Cass Elliot guests! Features a salute to Foreign Language films, and a sketch with puppies.
Video.title: Joel Grey, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests, appearing in "Carol & Sis" as an Irish maid. Harvey fantasizes about being a matador.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Ricardo Montalban guest. Cass joins a sketch about wallflowers, Ricardo takes a playboy role.
Video.title: Ricardo Montalban, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Michele Lee headlines a wonderful production number, which also offers a visit with the 10th Street Family.
Video.title: Michele Lee

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby appear in "Science Fiction Playhouse." "Carol & Sis" features Carol intoxicated.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones drop in to join in the fun!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: William Conrad & Isabel Sanford star! Short spoofs highlight this episode, which also features "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: William Conrad, Isabel Sanford

Video.summary: Mel Torme and Martha Raye guest. Featuring Martha and Carol as dog-lovers, and spoofs of Disney classics.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Guest James Coco takes a slow boat to romance in the Saturday Night Tearjerker movie spoof, "One Way Ticket."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: James Coco, Pointer Sister

Video.summary: Sketches include Harvey and Tim as dueling pianists, and a love triangle between Harvey, Cher...and Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: The season finale features Carol putting the cast on the spot for Q&A, as well as beloved recurring sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson guest star, highlighted by the stirring saga So Proudly We Heal.
Video.title: Debbie Reynolds, John Davidson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway is featured in two sketches, pairing him with Harvey and Carol, respectively.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Jim Nabors and Alice Ghostley guest! Alice is Roger's sister in "Carol & Sis", and Jim has an unusual date.
Video.title: Alice Ghostley, Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence appear in commercial spoofs. Tim plays The Oldest Man and is in a pantomime.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mae East returns to "V.I.P.", a Presidential "Fireside Chat", and a case of laryngitis on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Don Adams guest stars. Don plays a talk show host, Carol's husband in "The Lost Purse," and a griping father.
Video.title: Don Adams

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr accept Carol's mission: appear in "Mission: Improbable"...which includes a cameo!
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Carol salutes MGM with the help of guest stars Chita Rivera and Bob Newhart. Spoofs of classic movies abound.
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball tries to implement a fire safety program. Also: an oasis might be salvation for Harvey & Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in "As The Stomach Turns." Q&A and a contest reveals stiff completion.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest, featuring a toy ad and a court sketch. It's poker night on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: The conclusion of the fifth-season "Family Show" finale brings to a close the spoof "The Doily Sisters."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Step back in time with "The Family" as Eunice thinks back to her early days. Also, Tim plays a palace guard.
Video.title: Family Show
